title: Villager Transportation
description: Easier Villager transportation by using Camels and Llamas!
body:
![Alt text](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/vLUPqRLH/images/7e1db34002c56ad8a6f0500e812f2366560a7eaf.png)

## About:

A simple data pack that makes your travels of Villager transportation much easier by using Camels and Llamas. It's good for transporting employed Villagers with unique trades and biome-specific Villagers like Plains, Taiga, Jungle, or Swamp Villagers.

## Features:

### Camels
- To mount a Villager on your passenger seat of a Camel, ride a saddled Camel to the closest Villager.

![Alt text](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/vLUPqRLH/images/de38cda0d94eac521342fd13833fc472fa663d95.gif)

### Llamas
- To mount a Villager on a Llama, guide a carpeted Llama to the closest Villager.                                         
**(Also Villagers will mount on a carpeted Llama if it gets close in range)**

![Alt text](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/vLUPqRLH/images/a2164cad86040f95d3db01046e8522d950e27e1b.gif)


### Dismounting Villagers
- Right-click on the mounted Villager to dismount from Camels and Llamas. Also, Villagers can teleport to you when being dismounted. **(Also works for Villagers riding on Boats and Minecarts.)**

**Updated Description: Villagers no longer teleport at you when being dismounted and Llamas no longer get a speed increase when leashed and ridden.**


 **Notable Issue: Right-clicking on employed Villagers opens their trades GUI when being dismounted from rideable entities.**
